debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝² : CompleteLattice α
inst✝¹ : DistribLattice α
inst✝ : BoundedOrder α
S : Set α
R : @refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S
⊢ sSup (@decomposition_of_refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S R) = sSup S

failed_attempts:
apply le_antisymm
  · rw [decomposition_of_refinement, sSup_iUnion]
    apply iSup_le; intro D; apply iSup_le; intro hD
    sorry -- Requires R to be tight (contain only decompositions of elements of S)
  · apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro a ha
    obtain ⟨D, hD, rfl⟩ := R.carrier_span a ha
    exact sSup_le_sSup_of_subset D (subset_iUnion_of_subset D hD subset.rfl)

apply le_antisymm
  · apply sSup_le
    simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop]
    rintro x ⟨D, hD, hxD⟩
    sorry
  · apply sSup_le
    rintro s hs
    obtain ⟨D, hD, rfl⟩ := R.carrier_span s hs
    refine le_trans (le_sSup (by rfl)) (sSup_mono ?_)
    rw [decomposition_of_refinement]
    exact Set.subset_iUnion_of_subset D (Set.subset_iUnion_of_subset hD (Set.Subset.refl _))

apply le_antisymm
  · apply sSup_le
    simp only [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop]
    rintro x ⟨D, hD, hxD⟩
    -- Assuming R is a refinement, sSup D ∈ S is expected but not enforced by the type
    sorry
  · apply sSup_le
    intro a ha
    obtain ⟨D, hD, rfl⟩ := R.carrier_span a ha
    apply sSup_le_sSup_of_subset
    exact Set.subset_iUnion_of_subset D (Set.subset_iUnion_of_subset hD (le_refl D))

rw [decomposition_of_refinement, sSup_iUnion]
  apply le_antisymm
  · apply iSup_le; intro D; apply iSup_le; intro hD
    -- This direction requires ∀ D ∈ R, sSup D ≤ sSup S, which is not guaranteed by the definition of `refinement`.
    sorry
  · apply sSup_le_iff.mpr; intro a ha
    obtain ⟨D, hD, rfl⟩ := R.carrier_span a ha
    exact le_iSup_of_le D (le_iSup_of_le hD (le_refl _))

  · apply sSup_le_sSup

    sorry
  · apply sSup_le_sSup

  · rw [decomposition_of_refinement, sSup_iUnion]
    apply iSup_le; intro D; apply iSup_le; intro hD
    -- This direction requires ∀ D ∈ R, sSup D ≤ sSup S.

    sorry

    exact sSup_le_sSup (Set.subset_iUnion_of_subset D hD le_rfl)
